## Journal.JournalLibrary.addRecipeJournal() method

> Warning: This API is now obsolete.
> 
> Use addJournal instead which accepts both recipe and confection journals
> 

Adds a recipe journal record to the library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addRecipeJournal(journal: IRecipeJournalRecord): Result<JournalId>;
```
